docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMEEN, KALI MUGA AS TO DEFENDANT LACY, I. D. LACY, MARVIN DOES 1 TO 100 SUMMONS ISSUED
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $162.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMEEN, KALI MUGA AS TO DEFENDANT LACY, MARVIN
